summary_en: FY3/26 year-end dividend raised ¥2/share to ¥30/share (prior: ¥28/share). Annual dividend for FY3/26 now ¥58/share (prior: ¥56/share). Mid-term dividend unchanged at ¥28/share.
title_en: Notice of Revision to Dividend Forecast (Dividend Increase) for Fiscal Year Ending March 2026
translation_en_brief: TOPPAN Holdings announced on 14 May 2026 a revision to its dividend forecast for fiscal year ending 31 March 2026. The year-end dividend per share has been increased by ¥2 from the prior forecast of ¥28 per share to ¥30 per share. The interim dividend remains at ¥28 per share. Consequently, the full-year dividend for FY3/26 is now projected at ¥58 per share, compared to the prior forecast of ¥56 per share. The company stated that the increase reflects strong operational performance and is intended to respond to shareholder support while maintaining stable profit distribution and sustainable growth. The decision was made in light of consolidated earnings, payout ratio, cash position, retained earnings, and future investment plans.
